stemHtml: Plotting positions in charts by Dead Reckoning (DR) may be required..

options.a: in areas with high densities of airways and navigation aids.
options.b: during a flight with limited equipment and few navigational aids.
options.c: when any of the radio-navigation, INS or GPS sources are unavailable.
options.d: during a flight over sea using INS/IRS and GPS navigation.
